titlestmt.titleproper: St. Marks Episcopal Church of Newark records6045

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: St. Marks Episcopal Church of Newark records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: St. Mark's Episcopal Church of Newark (Newark, N.Y.)

did.abstract: One volume of vestry records (1850-1883) containing minutes of regular and special church meetings and some accounts, and a register (1850-1871) listing parishioners, baptisms, confirmations, marriages, burials and church offerings.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Until 1851 no organization existed in Newark, but isolated services had been held by the Reverend T.F. Wardwell, Rector of Grace Church in Lyons in 1830 and services had been held at different periods by the Reverend Mr. Spaulding and the Right Reverend W.H. Delancey, who had adminsitered the rite of confirmation to a class. On July 22, 1851 the church was legally organized and elected wardens and vestrymen. A subscription was begun to construct a church, a lot purchased, and the building was consecrated on December 28, 1852. In 1863 improvements costing $3,000 were made, making the total value of the church $8,000. The church's membership grew from 21 communicants in 1852 to 91 in 1877.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The records of St. Mark's Church include 1 volume of vestry records (1850-1883) containing minutes of regular and special church meetings and some accounts, and a register listing parishioners, baptisms, confirmations, marriages, burials and church offerings.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: St. Mark's Episcopal Church of Newark records, #6045. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Wayne County (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: Episcopal Church -- New York (State) -- Newark.
Church records and registers -- New York (State) -- Newark.

did.unittitle: "A Record of the official acts of the vestry of St. Mark's church Newark Wayne County W. N.Y. Organized in the year of our Lord 1851", 1850-1883 .

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The volume opens with records of the founding of the church, including a request to form the church to the Bishop of the Diocese of Western N.Y., (Dec. 1850), the Bishop's agreement (Dec. 19, 1850), and the incorporation notice (July 23, 1851).

Vestry minutes, which include both regular and special meetings (Mar. 28, 1853-Oct. 1, 1883) record the election of church rectors and discussion of their salary, the election of vestrymen, wardens, clerks, treasurers, delegates to Diocesan conventions and the appointment of church sextons. Church finances are documented in entries dealing with the procurement of loans, monthly collections, subscriptions, and the acquisition and sale of church property. Also included are entries dealing with church maintenance and improvement.
Following the minutes are financial records (1854-56) which include salary information, receipts, and a list of church expenditures.
The last page of the volume is an inventory of furniture at the rectory in 187^, with notes of changes in 1879 and 1883.

did.unittitle: "A Complete Parish Register Adapted for Parishes of the Protestant Episcopal Church in the United States", 1850-1871 .

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Parishioners: by family noting original members (1850)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Additional families (Sept. 9, 1852)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Individuals: (Jan. 1, l850-Apr. 1851, Apr. 1851-Sept. 19, 1852) noting baptism, confirmation, communion, and death or removal of people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Individuals: (Jan. 1, 1850-Sept. 19, 1852) and children noting number, names, date of birth, ordinances and remarks for 48 people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Individuals: (Sept, 19? 1852-Aug. 1853) included church received from, ordinances given, and death or removal for 30 people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Individuals: (Aug. 14, 1853-Aug. 1, 1854) lists information as above for 2 people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Individuals: (Sept. 19, 1852-Aug. 1853) includes member, names, date of birth, ordinances, and remarks for 4l people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Individuals: (Aug. ...) notes names and ordinances for 10 people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Heads of families in the parish and independent individuals with date, name, residence, and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Families including children: (Dec. 1850-Aug. 18, 1868) notes names, removals for 213 people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Revised list of families listing year, family, heads of family, and family members.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Additional names to ( - Aug. 1864) not connected vith those already entered.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Baptisms: listing name, date, parents, sponsors, date of birth, clergyman presiding and remarks for 187 persons

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Confirmations: list includes date, name, presiding bishop and remarks for 105 persons (Apr. 29, 1849-Jan. 26, 1870).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Communicants: list date, names, residence, date of dismissal for 139 people (Apr. 29, l849-Sept. 1, 1867).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Regular Communicants" (Apr. 9, 1868) lists 78 persons.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of members communing (1868-1869) 80 people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: List of members communing (1869-1-70) 73 people.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Marriages: lists name, date, place, clergy and witnesses (Jan. 21, 1853-Sept. 26, 1870).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Burials: lists date, name, place of interment, and minister (Mar. 14, 1850-Oct. 31, 1858).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Church offerings: includes date, type of collection, remarks and amount (Oct. 10, 1852-May 15, 1870).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Official Expenses report to the bishop, 1870-1871. (Sept. 8, 1871.
